title: 1m Vertical Garden
description: Our vertical gardens are made from the finest quality synthetic materials and look real to even the most critical eye. They are lightweight and fixed onto a flexible foam backing. They make the perfect ceremony backdrop or feature behind your bridal table or dessert table and can be attached to a freestanding mesh backdrop, leaned against a flat surface, or hung from a wall.
display: Use the metal mesh backing attached to the garden to hang it from the wall or attach it to our white metal mesh backdrop.
